review:
ISSUES:
- [severity:warning] src/dashboard/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo - Build metadata references new files (`sessionspage.tsx`, `taskboard.tsx`) that are not present in this diff, suggesting an incomplete file set for the PR.
- [severity:info] src/dashboard/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo - Build artifact committed to version control. This file should be added to `.gitignore` to avoid merge conflicts and repository bloat.
- [severity:info] src/backend/config.py:108-114 - New RAG settings (hybrid, rerank, etc.) are defined in the configuration model but are not yet integrated into the backend service logic in this diff.
- [severity:info] .claude/hooks/stopEvent.js:84 - `gemini-state.json` is updated synchronously in a backgrounded process. While acceptable for CLI usage, it may lead to race conditions (lost `callCount` or status updates) if multiple background tasks finish concurrently.
- [severity:info] .claude/hooks/userPromptSubmit.js:241 - No cleanup logic for stale or shown review files in `.claude/gemini-bridge/reviews/`. Over time, this directory will accumulate JSON files.

VERDICT: needs-attention
SUMMARY: The PR introduces a useful Gemini-based review bridge and fixes dashboard layout issues, but is missing referenced source files and lacks integration for the new RAG configuration.
